attacking_style: Not a primary attacker; functions as a sprint lead-out specialist delivering final acceleration in the last 200m before releasing sprinter.
team_tactics: Executes elite-level lead-outs with minimal team support, demonstrating ability to deliver sprinters effectively even when outnumbered by rival trains.
terrain_preference: Flat sprint finishes where lead-out skills are decisive; capable of taking opportunistic results when lead-out duties are compromised.
vulnerability: Reliant on team structure remaining intact; observations show success when plans adapt, but role is exposed without a designated sprinter to deliver.
key_patterns: Delivers superior 200m lead-outs even with less team depth than rivals (2 observations)
Capable of personal results when team lead-out collapses, showing versatility beyond pure domestique role (2 observations)
Consistently demonstrates strong sprint positioning and timing in final kilometer across multi-year span
form_trajectory: positive: 2022 Vuelta observations show elite lead-out execution, suggesting sustained high-level performance into later career
